description: Integrate OSI Layered Health into Command Center Dashboard

context.goal: Refactor the Command Center Dashboard to display the 7-Layer OSI health metrics using the enriched aq-qa JSON output.
context.instructions:
1. Add a new GET /api/health/layered endpoint to serve-dashboard.sh that executes 'aq-qa 0 --json' and groups the output by 'layer'.
2. Update dashboard.html to include a 7-block status grid representing the OSI layers.
3. Ensure the UI gracefully handles missing or offline layers.
